name: The Writhing Jar
explicitMods:
2 Enemy Writhing Worms escape the Flask when used
Writhing Worms are destroyed when Hit
descrText: Right click to drink. Can only hold charges while in belt. Refills as you kill monsters.
flavourText: To achieve godhood, they would cast off all that god has gifted us.
Mortality, compassion, even the sanctity of flesh.
- High Templar Voll

name: Screams of the Desiccated
explicitMods: You have Diamond Shrine Buff while affected by no Flasks
You have Impenetrable Shrine Buff while affected by no Flasks
flavourText: "I staggered on, dying of thirst... I thought I found respite,
but no... it was a pit of newborns... dry and hollow...
and they screamed still, begging me for vengeance..."

typeLine: Persevering Prismatic Tincture of the Unleashed
implicitMods: 126% increased Elemental Damage with Melee Weapons
explicitMods: Melee Weapon Damage Penetrates 20% Elemental Resistances
descrText: Right click to activate. Only one Tincture in your belt can be active at a time. Mana Burn causes you to lose 1% of your maximum Mana per stack per second. Can be deactivated manually, or will automatically deactivate when you reach 0 Mana.

name: Shavronne's Revelation
explicitMods: Right ring slot: You cannot Regenerate Mana
Right ring slot: Regenerate 5.6% of Energy Shield per second
Right ring slot: +260 to maximum Mana
Left ring slot: You cannot Recharge or Regenerate Energy Shield
Left ring slot: Regenerate 31.2 Mana per Second
Left ring slot: +351 to maximum Energy Shield
flavourText: "Shavronne held Sanity in her right
hand and Revelation in her left.
Brutus chose the left hand."
- Kadavrus, Surgeon to the Umbra

socketedItems.secDescrText: Each supported spell skill will track damage you take, and be triggered when the total damage taken reaches a threshold. Cannot support skills used by totems, traps, or mines. Vaal skills, channelling skills, and skills with a reservation cannot be triggered.

Trigger Supported Spells when you take 3580 total Damage from Hits
Supported Skills require 10% reduced amount of Damage taken to Trigger
